overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a player character with a red mohawk walking through a vibrant, neon-lit downtown district. The clip showcases futuristic skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, steam vents, and moderate vehicle traffic on a clear morning.

agents.ego_description: player character walking along the sidewalk approaching a construction barrier

entered.detail: low-rise building with green and red neon signage and large windows
steam rising from ground grates along the sidewalk
cluster of high-rise glass and steel towers with billboards
large illuminated advertisement with orange text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a downtown street corner with steam rising from sidewalk vents. The player walks forward along a concrete sidewalk flanked by commercial buildings with neon signage, approaching a distant construction barrier. Tall futuristic skyscrapers dominate the skyline ahead.

events.description: enters the narrow corridor alongside the red neon construction barrier

agents.ego_description: player character with red mohawk walking along the construction barrier, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: small figure with green hat walking ahead of the player along the sidewalk

entered.detail: long red metal barrier with pink neon trim and mesh windows showing construction behind
large advertisement showing a robotic hand with 'DYNALAR' text
tall circular building wrapped with multiple levels of digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor formed by a red neon-lit construction barrier on the right. The camera follows the player character with the distinctive red mohawk as they walk past the DYNALAR billboard and mesh fence sections revealing a construction site. A cylindrical advertising tower becomes visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with hotel and advertising towers

events.description: turns right at the intersection to cross the street

agents.ego_description: player character turning right and beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection

notable_agents.action: green muscle car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: building with large blue 'HOTEL' signage and Japanese characters
large digital screen displaying anime-style character with 'WET DREAM' text
elevated highway structure crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the construction corridor into a wide intersection. Turning right, they approach a crosswalk as a green muscle car passes by. The cylindrical ad tower and a prominent hotel building with blue neon signage dominate the view, while an elevated highway overpass spans the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with hotel facade

events.description: blue sports car speeds through the intersection from right to left
pedestrians finish crossing as traffic continues to flow

agents.ego_description: player character waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

notable_agents.action: blue sports car rapidly crossing the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection corner
steam rising from grates near the hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: The player waits at the intersection crosswalk as a blue sports car speeds past. The hotel building with prominent neon signage now fills the left side of the frame, while steam rises from street vents near the entrance. Pedestrians continue crossing as the camera observes the flowing traffic and vibrant downtown atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense downtown district that transitions from a narrow, industrial corridor into a wide, vibrant city intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk where steam rises from vents, moving past neon-lit commercial buildings toward a distant construction barrier. As the player character with the red mohawk enters a confined passage, the view is flanked by red neon barriers and a DYNALAR billboard before a cylindrical advertising tower emerges in the distance. The scene then opens into a broad intersection where the camera turns right, passing a green muscle car and revealing a massive hotel building with blue neon signage beneath an elevated highway overpass. Finally, the perspective settles at a crosswalk as a blue sports car speeds past, with the towering hotel and rising steam vents framing the bustling flow of downtown traffic.
